subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! We have heard thy call, and at this hour when the sorrows of the world have turned towards this Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله ندایت را شنیدیم و در این حین که احزان عالم باین مظلوم توجه
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @contention and conflict, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
